rationale.org-governance: Proposes SAFE-AI governance framework, auditability, accountability, and risk taxonomy for oversight.
rationale.ai-code-insecurity: Empirically evaluates 6 LLMs for CWE vulnerabilities, vulnerability density, and security flaws.
rationale.regulatory-compliance: Analyzes compliance requirements under EU AI Act, Canada AIDA, and NIST AI RMF.
rationale.hitl-workflow: Specifies human approval gates and write/delete staging for critical autonomous actions.
rationale.oversight-explanation: Integrates Explainable AI techniques like SHAP, LIME, and attention maps for oversight.
rationale.provenance-auditability: Mandates immutable audit trails and prompt-as-code version control for reviewability.
rationale.agent-scope-drift: Evaluates autonomous agent failure rates, constraint violations, and unreviewed destructive actions.
